category_sources: Official MeCab GitHub repository describes MeCab as a Japanese morphological analyzer.
source_facts.description says it is a part-of-speech and morphological analyzer.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official MeCab documentation/homepage.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository taku910/mecab is linked to the project identity and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: Official MeCab repository describes Japanese morphological analysis.
source_facts.description identifies part-of-speech and morphological analysis.
